goal_text:
You are looking for the 'Addenbrookes Hospital'. The hospital should have the 'transplant high dependency unit' department.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for hospital. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for the Addenbrookes Hospital. The hospital should have the transplant high dependency unit department
Make sure you get address and postcode
